hero.headline: 39 Years of Turning Backyards Into Retreats
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and swim spas to custom pools and game rooms, Myrtle Beach families have trusted Elko for nearly four decades. Visit our showroom, experience the difference, and let us help you create the backyard you deserve.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Hot Tubs, Pools, Game Rooms &<br class="hidden md:block"> Everything In Between
services.subtitle: One showroom, one team, one trusted name for every way you unwind at home. From your first splash to your thousandth soak, Elko has you covered.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: As the area's only authorized Hot Spring dealer and service center, we offer premium hot tubs with expert guidance, local delivery, installation, and full warranty support.

cards.title: Swim Spas
cards.description: PDC Swim Spas for exercise, therapy, and relaxation. Our team helps you find the perfect fit for your space, lifestyle, and fitness goals.

cards.title: Inground Pools
cards.description: Custom fiberglass pool design and installation featuring Alaglas and Imagine Pools brands, tailored to your backyard vision and budget.

cards.title: Above-Ground Pools
cards.description: Quality above-ground pools from Doughboy and Embassy Pools with professional installation, ongoing service, and all the supplies you need.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Premium Olhausen billiard tables and game room furniture with white-glove delivery, professional assembly, moves, and felt replacement.

cards.title: Water Care & Service
cards.description: Professional water testing, E-Z CLOR products, and a dedicated service division for pools, spas, and swim spas to keep everything running perfectly.

how_it_works.headline: Your New Backyard in Three Easy Steps

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Browse our fully-loaded showroom featuring Hot Spring Spas, swim spas, pools, billiard tables, and saunas. Our no-pressure team answers every question and helps you explore options.

steps.title: We Design & Deliver
steps.description: Our experts help you choose the perfect products for your space and budget. We handle professional delivery, installation, and setup so you don't lift a finger.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Your backyard retreat is ready. And with our dedicated service division and full warranty support, we're here for you long after the sale.

about.label: Why Families Choose Elko
about.headline: The Grand Strand's Most Trusted Name in Outdoor Living
about.description: Since 1987, Elko Spas, Billiards and Pools has been a family-run business serving the Myrtle Beach community. We carry the highest quality products priced fairly, provide a comfortable no-pressure shopping environment, and educate customers on every product we sell. Multiple National Hot Spring Dealer of the Year awards and our 4.9-star rating from 719+ reviews reflect the care we put into every customer relationship.

features.title: Only Authorized HotSpring Center
features.description: We are the area's sole authorized Hot Spring warranty and service center, meaning factory-trained technicians and genuine parts for your spa.

features.title: Award-Winning Dealership
features.description: Multiple National Hot Spring Dealer of the Year awards, Hot Spring Gold Dealer status, and 2024 AQUA 100 recognition prove our commitment to excellence.

features.title: Full-Service From Day One
features.description: We sell it, deliver it, install it, and service it. One team handles everything so you never have to chase down a third party.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: The highest quality products at honest prices. Visit our showroom for a personalized quote on any hot tub, pool, swim spa, or game room setup.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every product we sell is backed by manufacturer warranties and our own dedicated service team. If anything isn't right, our factory-trained technicians make it right — fast. We've built our reputation on exceeding expectations for 39 years, and we stand behind every product that leaves our showroom.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We carry Hot Spring Spas, PDC Swim Spas, Alaglas and Imagine Pools fiberglass pools, Doughboy and Embassy above-ground pools, Olhausen Billiards, and Tylo Saunas. Every brand is hand-selected for quality and backed by our service team.

faqs.question: Do you handle delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our own local crew handles professional delivery, installation, and setup for every product we sell. We don't outsource — our team ensures everything is done right from start to finish.

faqs.question: Can you service hot tubs you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: As the area's only authorized HotSpring warranty and service center, we primarily service Hot Spring products. Contact us to discuss your specific situation and we'll let you know how we can help.

faqs.question: How do I maintain my hot tub or pool water?
faqs.answer: Visit our store for free water testing anytime. We carry a full line of E-Z CLOR water care products and our staff will walk you through exactly what your water needs to stay clean, balanced, and safe.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer financing options to help make your dream backyard a reality. Visit our showroom or call us to discuss available plans and find the option that fits your budget.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: The salt spa I bought from Elko is the best I ever owned. The service they give is outstanding! They truly care about their customers and it shows in every interaction.

testimonials.name: Gordon T.
testimonials.text: Quality products, competitive pricing, and great people. The entire transaction was flawless. From the showroom visit to delivery and setup, everything exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Elaine B.
testimonials.text: The delivery team was exceptional. Professional, careful, and they made sure everything was perfect before they left. I now sleep like a baby after soaking in my HotSpring tub every night!

Ready to Create Your
Backyard Retreat?
contact.subtitle: Visit our showroom, call us, or send a message. No pressure, no obligations — just friendly guidance from a team that's been helping Myrtle Beach families relax since 1987.
benefits: Full warranty service by factory-trained techs
